name: charbbieee
shortDesc: A block architect who turns dirt, stone, and questionable amounts of free time into legendary builds.
funFact: Can spend 5 hours building a house but forget to add a door.

name: jeginaaa
shortDesc: An animal whisperer who can't resist bringing a home a new animal. Parrots, dogs, cats, fish, horses, donkeys, you name it!
funFact: Can tame any animal on the server but will fail to swim up water.
quote: “Wait up there, I'm coming (tries to swim up water).”

name: DimpledDwarf
shortDesc: An adopted child who dies too often
funFact: DimpledDwarf has a unique ability to respawn quickly after dying in Minecraft, making them a resilient player despite their frequent deaths.
quote: I may die often, but I always come back stronger!

name: plainpixie
shortDesc: Mother of the group making sure everyone jasxwhat they need before an adventure.
funFact: wants to go ming l mining but is afraidof the dark.
quote: charbie needs to face the warden.

name: LordMalcolmII
shortDesc: An explorer with a huge love for dying opportunities
funFact: Goes mining without mining and comes back with dirt

name: Brautistic
shortDesc: Goes mining and loses everything just to go mining again
specialty: Collecting LordMalcom’s items after he dies
funFact: Brautistic barely even has a chest, all his valuables are in his inventory.
quote: You should've seen my last hunger games

name: zephyr707
role: Whatever you want me to be, I'll be it
achievements: It's all about the memories, not the accolades
